synopsis: After Han Solo skillfully pilots the *Millennium Falcon* to destroy two TIE fighters, Leia remarks that Jedi pilots developed that same maneuver, and recounts a story about Obi-Wan Kenobi. Traveling as a passenger aboard a pleasure cruiser, Kenobi is told by Captain Quasar that Merson pirates have been spotted in the Merson asteroid belt. The attacking ships are quickly destroyed, but Obi-Wan suspects the Mersons were lured by a signal from within the cruiser. The other passengers accuse the known criminal Augustus Tryll, but Kenobi refuses to judge without proof. When more Merson ships appear, he realizes the signal they are tracking comes from an innocent fermentation device aboard the cruiser. Once he destroys it, the pirates lose the cruiser's trail and the danger passes.
title: Star Wars (1977) #24: Silent Drifting
